customers_say: Customers find the smart door lock to be of excellent quality and appreciate its secure locking system that sets a new standard for home safety. Moreover, the installation process receives positive feedback, with one customer highlighting the excellent job done by the installer. Additionally, customers praise its user-friendly app, multiple access methods, and advanced security features, while also noting its great appearance and value for money.

reviews.author: Abyisheik
reviews.title: Installation was great.
reviews.body: I bought the MyGate Smart Lock Plus primarily because of its scheduled Passage Mode, expecting the door to automatically remain unlocked during specific hours so my domestic staff could enter without requiring access credentials. Unfortunately, that's not how it works. Although the app allows you to schedule Passage Mode and even shows that the mode has started, the lock does not actually enter Passage Mode automatically. It requires someone to physically unlock the door using a registered fingerprint, PIN, or another authorized access method after the scheduled start time before Passage Mode

reviews.author: Nitish
reviews.title: Overall function, high price though
reviews.body: Would say functionality wise no complaints though i really wanted a video one in this price

reviews.author: Ash
reviews.title: Very handy and useful
reviews.body: This has given me ease of life.. since making multiple keys for family members is challenging.. especially children

reviews.author: Dileep Viswanathan
reviews.title: No Installation support in Kerala.
reviews.body: No installation support in Kerala. But the product is good. I had to struggle a lot and got it installed myself.

reviews.author: Placeholder
reviews.title: Good door lock and well installed
reviews.body: Super work .. Skilled professional... Super fast... Very satisfied..
